title: Business Development Representative
description: JPMorgan Chase is recruiting a Business Development Representative for our Phoenix office. This entry-level position offers excellent training in financial services and exposure to our corporate banking platform. You'll build relationships with institutional clients and develop a strong foundation in business development within a rigorous, merit-based environment.
responsibilities: Identify and qualify new business opportunities within assigned territory using proprietary business intelligence
Schedule and prepare client meetings; deliver compelling presentations on JPMorgan Chase products and services
Maintain accurate prospect tracking in CRM system; update client information and interaction history
Research potential clients and develop customized pitch strategies aligned with their business needs
Support team with proposal preparation and client event coordination

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited university
skills: Strong work ethic and ability to handle rejection
Basic financial acumen and business sense
Ability to work effectively in a team environment

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
